flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Roger Williams University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.6k → $44.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Roger Williams University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.6k → $44.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Roger Williams University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
